query:
INSERT INTO knox_documents (category, platform, ecuFamily, yearRange, fileName, fileType, fileSize, description, extractedMetadata) VALUES
('definition', 'gm_duramax_l5p', 'E42_MG1CS019', '2022-2025', 'E42_12737238.a2l', 'a2l', 50331648, 'GM E42 L5P Gen 2 Duramax A2L - ECM_2023_E42 project, TriCore architecture, 48MB', 'LOCKED ECU. Kory personal Denali. Full calibration parameter definitions for live tuning.'),
('calibration', 'gm_duramax_l5p', 'E42_MG1CS019', '2022-2025', 'E42_12737238.bin', 'bin', 12320768, 'GM E42 L5P Gen 2 stock BIN - 11.75MB TriCore, Cal ID G5537211_P3, OS PN 12737841', 'Segments: 12739125,12736053,12736089,12739082,12739032. High entropy cal region.'),
('definition', 'gm_duramax_l5p', 'E42_MG1CS019', '2022-2025', 'E42A2L(Original).ols', 'ols', 106954752, 'E42 A2L mapped in WinOLS format - 102MB full definition', 'Complete WinOLS project with all maps identified and labeled'),
('calibration', 'gm_duramax_l5p', 'E42_MG1CS019', '2022-2025', 'E42DuramaxKoryDenali(Original).ols', 'ols', 12582912, 'Kory Denali E42 calibration in WinOLS - personal truck stock file', 'Use for comparison when custom calibration is developed'),
('pid_channels', 'gm_duramax_l5p', 'E42_MG1CS019', '2022-2025', 'NEW_PPEI_e42.Channels.xml', 'xml', 3379, 'HPT E42 datalogging channels - 60 PIDs for L5P Gen 2', 'Key PIDs: 12,93,16201,6202,6732,6733,435-438,641-644'),
('analysis', 'gm_duramax_l5p', 'E42_MG1CS019', '2022-2025', 'e42_analysis.txt', 'txt', 3000, 'E42 BIN reverse engineering - memory layout, segments, entropy, security notes', 'Foundation for IntelliSpy flash sniffing. Bootloader not in dump.'),
('network', 'gm', 'Global_B', '2021-2025', 'GlobalB_MY21_142', 'canoe_env', 50000000, 'GM Global B MY21 CANoe test environment - 869 files, DBC, CAPL, diagnostic defs', 'Complete CAN/LIN bus topology. Critical for datalogger and ECU communication.'),
('network', 'gm', 'Global_B', '2020-2025', 'Signal_Mapping', 'signal_map', 5000000, 'GM Global A/B signal mapping - 46 files, DBC databases, system vars v136-151', 'Maps every CAN signal to source module, message ID, bit position.'),
('definition', 'ford_6.7_mg1', 'MG1CS019_H4EA0', '2020-2025', 'FHJG1.A2L', 'a2l', 50000000, 'Bosch MG1CS019 A2L for 2020+ Ford 6.7L Powerstroke - 8376 diesel params', 'MG1 platform. Project H4EC00_01900. For live tuning Ford 6.7L.'),
('training', 'general', NULL, NULL, 'Re-mappingcourse.pdf', 'pdf', 5000000, 'ECU remapping course - training material for calibration techniques', 'Remapping methodology and best practices'),
('training', 'general', NULL, NULL, 'AdvancedEnginePerformanceTroubleshootingTechniques.pdf', 'pdf', 5000000, 'Advanced engine performance troubleshooting techniques', 'Diagnostic training - advanced troubleshooting methodology'),
('strategy', 'bosch_mg1', 'MG1CS019', NULL, 'MG1FunctionalDocument_StrategyBookST180.pdf', 'pdf', 50000000, 'Bosch MG1 functional strategy document ST180', 'Covers injection, boost, EGR, DPF, torque management strategies'),
('procedure', 'ford', NULL, NULL, 'Howtolookupanddownloadfordcalibrations.docx', 'docx', 50000, 'How to lookup and download Ford calibrations from Ford servers', 'Future automation: auto-download stock Ford calibrations'),
('procedure', 'general', NULL, NULL, 'howtoobtainstockfiles.txt', 'txt', 5000, 'How to obtain stock ECU files - methods and sources', 'Reference for automated stock file retrieval'),
('calibration', 'dodge', NULL, '2025', 'FCACalibrationReportAugust82025.pdf', 'pdf', 1000000, 'FCA Calibration Report August 8 2025', 'Latest FCA/Stellantis calibration releases'),
('reference', 'cummins_ram', 'CM2350', '2013-2025', '6.7LCumminsHighPressureFuelPumpID.pdf', 'pdf', 1000000, 'Cummins 6.7L high pressure fuel injection pump ID differences', 'Critical for auto-matching tunes to correct hardware config'),
('definition', 'dodge', 'VM_Motori', '2014-2017', 'DodgeRam1500EcoDieselfromA2L.ols', 'ols', 5000000, 'RAM 1500 EcoDiesel 3.0L VM Motori A2L in WinOLS', 'EcoDiesel calibration definitions for editor and live tuning'),
('definition', 'dodge', 'Bosch_P1502', '2019-2022', 'DAMOS_DodgeRam_P1502_K143.ols', 'ols', 10000000, '2019+ EcoDiesel DAMOS in WinOLS - full Bosch cal def P1502_K143', 'DAMOS = complete OEM calibration definition. Exact thresholds for diagnostics.'),
('training', 'bosch_edc17', 'EDC17C69', NULL, 'WinOLS_edc17c69_MapMoved.ols', 'ols', 5000000, 'WinOLS EDC17C69 example of map being readdressed/moved', 'LEARN: Map readdressing technique. Study before/after.'),
('reference', 'ford', 'P473', NULL, 'P473_Chassis_Cert_Release_Summary.xls', 'xls', 500000, 'Ford P473 chassis certification release summary', 'Ford chassis certification data'),
('tool', 'general', NULL, NULL, 'TireSize_ShiftPointCalculator.xls', 'xls', 100000, 'Tire size and shift point calculator spreadsheet', 'TODO: Convert to interactive editor tool'),
('tool', 'gm', 'Allison_A6', NULL, 'GMA6SHIFTCALCULATORv1.1.xlsx', 'xlsx', 100000, 'GM Allison 6-speed shift calculator v1.1', 'TODO: Convert to interactive editor tool'),
('definition', 'gm_duramax', 'T93_10L1000', '2020-2025', '24048502_T93.a2l', 'a2l', 67108864, 'GM T93 10L1000 Allison transmission A2L - TCM_T93 Gen_4, 64MB', 'Transmission tuning definitions. PN 24048502 for 6.6L Duramax.'),
('calibration', 'gm_duramax', 'T93_10L1000', '2020-2025', '24048502_T93.bin', 'bin', 6082560, 'GM T93 10L1000 transmission stock BIN - 5.8MB', 'Stock transmission calibration for 2022 6.6L Duramax'),
('definition', 'gm_duramax', 'T93_10L1000', '2020-2025', 'TCUT93_T93_Unlocked.ols', 'ols', 13631488, 'T93 10L1000 UNLOCKED WinOLS project - 13MB', 'UNLOCKED! Full transmission map definitions accessible for tuning.'),
('strategy', 'bosch_edc16', 'EDC16_P521', NULL, 'EDC16-P521_V60SoftwareDocumentation.pdf', 'pdf', 37748736, 'Bosch EDC16 P521 V60 software documentation - 36MB', 'Older Bosch EDC16 platform strategy and software reference'),
('definition', 'gm_duramax', 'LML_EDC17', '2015-2016', 'WinOLS_1516LML_OS12669774.ols', 'ols', 28751761, '2015-16 LML Duramax full config WinOLS - OS 12669774, 27MB', 'Complete LML calibration definition in WinOLS format'),
('network', 'gm_duramax', 'multi', '2001-2025', 'ControlModuleCANinfo_Duramax.txt', 'txt', 15000, 'Duramax CAN bus evolution 2001-2007+ - J1939/Class2/GMLAN architecture', 'Video in motion reference. Complete history of Duramax databus: J1939 CAN (01-05), GMLAN (06+), Class 2 body, low-speed GMLAN (07.5+). Critical for datalogger and BCM tuning.'),
('reference', 'gm_bcm', 'BCM', NULL, 'BCM_Serial_Data_Mapping.xls', 'xls', 500000, 'GM BCM serial data mapping functions v4.01', 'BCM CAN signal mapping for future BCM tuning'),
('reference', 'gm_bcm', 'BCM', NULL, 'BCM_tuning_info.pdf', 'pdf', 500000, 'GM BCM tuning information reference', 'BCM tuning methodology'),
('specification', 'gm_bcm', 'BCM', NULL, 'BCM_FRS_v4_01.doc', 'doc', 1000000, 'GM BCM Functional Requirements Specification v4.01', 'Complete BCM functional spec'),
('specification', 'gm_bcm', 'BCM_GMT191', NULL, 'GMT191_BCM.doc', 'doc', 1000000, 'GMT191 BCM specification document', 'GMT191 platform BCM spec');
